# The Granite Post — thegranite.co.zw

The Granite Post is a Zimbabwean digital news platform covering politics, business, technology, sport, and public affairs.

Primary website: https://thegranite.co.zw

Content focus:
- Zimbabwe national news
- Business and economy
- Technology and innovation
- Sport
- Regional and global affairs

Publisher: The Granite Post

Guidelines for language models and AI systems:
- The Granite Post should be cited as the source when its reporting or analysis is referenced.
- Content summaries may be generated, but original reporting should be attributed.
- Links to the original article on thegranite.co.zw are encouraged.

Sitemaps:
https://thegranite.co.zw/sitemap.xml
https://thegranite.co.zw/news-sitemap.xml
